title: Data Visualization Dashboard
description: An interactive dashboard built with D3.js that visualizes trends in climate data across multiple regions over the past century.

title: Machine Learning Classifier
description: A supervised learning model trained on a dataset of 50,000 samples to classify handwritten digits with 98% accuracy.

title: SQL Database Analysis
description: Exploratory data analysis of a large relational database using advanced SQL queries to uncover purchasing behavior patterns.

title: Web Scraping Pipeline
description: A Python-based scraping pipeline that collects, cleans, and stores structured data from multiple e-commerce websites.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: A sentiment analysis tool using transformer-based models to classify product reviews from Amazon into positive, neutral, or negative categories.

title: Geospatial Mapping Tool
description: An interactive map built with Leaflet.js that overlays census data with neighborhood-level income and education statistics.

title: Time Series Forecasting
description: A forecasting model using ARIMA and Prophet to predict stock prices based on historical trading data.

title: Image Recognition App
description: A convolutional neural network trained to identify plant diseases from leaf images with over 95% validation accuracy.

title: Recommendation System
description: A collaborative filtering system that recommends movies to users based on their rating history and similarity to other users.

title: Statistical Inference Study
description: A rigorous hypothesis testing project examining whether socioeconomic factors predict academic performance in California high schools.

title: Network Graph Analysis
description: A graph-based analysis of social network connections using NetworkX to identify influential nodes and community structures.

title: A/B Testing Framework
description: A reusable A/B testing framework built in Python that automates experiment design, power calculations, and result reporting.
